# Build Pipeline

From Rust source to native binary, testing, linting, and release.

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    SRC["crates/**/*.rs<br/>(6 crates)"] -->|"cargo build<br/>--release"| BIN["target/release/ecc<br/>(native binary)"]

    BIN --> CLI["ecc version<br/>ecc install<br/>ecc init<br/>ecc audit<br/>(CLI commands)"]
    BIN --> HOOK["bin/ecc-hook<br/>bin/ecc-shell-hook.sh<br/>(hook shims)"]

    subgraph validation["Validation"]
        SRC --> TEST["cargo test<br/>670+ tests"]
        SRC --> CLIPPY["cargo clippy<br/>-- -D warnings"]
        SRC --> LINT["npm run lint<br/>markdownlint"]
    end

    TEST --> RELEASE["GitHub Release<br/>platform tarballs"]
    CLIPPY --> RELEASE
    LINT --> RELEASE
```
